title: cocculus lonchophyllus
intro: Cocculus lonchophyllus, also known as the moonseed or California moonseed, is a perennial climbing vine native to Western North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to its sedative and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Cocculus lonchophyllus include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. The plant can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
